title: Ithentic Iced Moroccan Almond Couscous Royal
description: A malty, dense festive moroccan dish featuring ground almonds, robata-grilled in a form of couscous-royal, ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly.

ingredients.name: Grilled fruit slices (such as strawberries, bananas or figs) for garnish

instructions: Rinse the couscous and soak it in water or almond milk until softened.
Combine ground almonds, saffron threads, salt, and lemon juice into a pan if using.
Bring mixture to a boil, reduce heat, cover and simmer for about 5 minutes.
Add soaked couscous to the almond mixture and mix well.
Pour the couscous-royal into serving dishes or molds.
Chill the couscous-royal in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
Top with grilled fruit slices and drizzle with iced Moroccan mint syrup before serving.
